title: Display Cases
description: Simple, interactive display cases that can store and showcase items in the world.
body:
## Ketket's Display Cases Display Cases is a quality of life datapack that introduces interactive display cases capable of storing and showcasing items directly in the world. Designed to feel fully vanilla, these display cases provide intuitive interactions, visual customization, and redstone functionality without adding complex mechanics or GUIs. ![aa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eZ8HdbsB/images/46b0fa37ab43fa9a06b92a6e01c957c312c6d6f8.png) Players can insert or retrieve items with a simple right-click. When an item is placed inside, the display case visually shows it and can be customized to fit different build styles and use cases. ## CRAFTING ![craftingdc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed96034ce4c2e8ef1bcf7a236a71c3af0def6aff.png) ## IN-GAME ![GİF1](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/117019767/529742552-d126b385-0663-4cc2-8117-552ab21a11a3.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NjY1MTA4MTMsIm5iZiI6MTc2NjUxMDUxMywicGF0aCI6Ii8xMTcwMTk3NjcvNTI5NzQyNTUyLWQxMjZiMzg1LTA2NjMtNGNjMi04MTE3LTU1MmFiMjFhMTFhMy5naWY_.-GwXrLsIbm7y0pyH_3MDnh9MPXqblNuW_kKreORHXzQ) ![GIF2](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/117019767/529742486-d63e09e5-2622-432c-8a45-b39537420c4f.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NjY1MTA4MTMsIm5iZiI6MTc2NjUxMDUxMywicGF0aCI6Ii8xMTcwMTk3NjcvNTI5NzQyNDg2LWQ2M2UwOWU1LTI2MjItNDMyYy04YTQ1LWIzOTUzNzQyMGM0Zi5naWY_.queFts88zWkoQD1vWOwCWPdGhnAVVFZ77Erx3cR6geY) ## 🖱️ Interactions ### ▶️ Right-Click (No Sneak) With an item in hand: Inserts the item into the display case If the case already contains an item: The item is returned to the player ### ▶️ Left-Click Breaks the display case normally ### ▶️ Shift + Right-Click - 🖐️ **With an Empty Hand** 1. Cycles between two display modes: A standard item appearance, A clean item display mode - **🎨 With an Item in Hand** 1. Holding a dye: Changes the glass color of the display case 2. Holding a water bucket: Resets the glass back to its default clear state 3. Holding any other block: Changes the base plate (bottom block) of the display case ### 🔴 Redstone Integration The display case emits a redstone signal when it contains an item No signal is produced when the display case is empty This allows display cases to be used in redstone systems, item detectors, and decorative logic builds.
Check My Other Projects - **[Silk/Fortune Switch](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-silk-fortune-switch)** - Instantly switch between Fortune and Silk Touch enchantments on your tools with a simple right-click. - **[Display Cases](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-displaycases)** - Interactive display cases that can store items, change appearance, and emit redstone signals when occupied. - **[Better Cauldrons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-better-cauldrons)** - Throw dirt or concrete powder into a water-filled cauldron to instantly create mud or concrete. Wash dyed blocks and items back to their clean form with an intuitive, vanilla-friendly system. - **[Mannequins](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-mannequins)** - Add fully customizable mannequins that can hold items, change poses, swap skins, and bring your world to life. - **[UndyingRefill](https://modrinth.com/datapack/undyingrefill)** - Automatically replaces a used Totem of Undying by pulling another one from your inventory—or even from the first shulker box containing a totem. Never fumble your totems again. - **[Graves](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketket-graves)** - This datapack creates a grave when a player dies, safely storing their items. Retrieve your belongings without worrying about losing them! - **[Quick Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/quick-shulker-boxes)** - Quick Shulker Boxes lets you open Shulker Boxes while holding them, without needing to place them on the ground. Simply shift-right-click to access your shulker boxes. - **[Stackraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stackraft)** - Compress farm items like sugarcane, gunpowder, and more to save space. Perfect for managing large farms and keeping your inventory organized. Also works with the new Auto Crafters. - **[EasyCoords](https://modrinth.com/datapack/easycoords)** - Displays your coordinates, daytime, and direction on screen, simplifies location sharing, and shows death coordinates in chat. - **[Better Hanging Signs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-hanging-signs)** - It will enable your hanging signs to hold items. - **[FurnniCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-furnicraft)** - Furnish your creations with a wide variety of unique furniture in the vanilla style, without the need for any resource packs.

🚯 Uninstall 1. Run ```/function ketket_dc:uninstall``` command. 2. Disable datapack.
